Curated playlists for every moment of your day at Gate 7.

Morning Regulars
Smooth awakening. Jazz and indie tracks to energize your morning ritual.

9 AM – 11 AM

lofi Indie Pop 2025

Your Second Home, Your Soundtrack

At Gate 7, we believe music is part of what makes a space feel like home. These playlists are carefully curated for each moment of your day – whether you're starting your morning ritual, settling in for work, catching up with friends, or unwinding in the evening.

Smooth Transitions
Switch playlists 15 minutes before each time slot for a natural flow
Community Feel
Music that complements conversation and connection at every hour
Quality Curation
Playlists that evolve with Spotify's regular updates
Personal Touch
Mix your own blend from multiple playlists for a custom Gate 7 sound
